text:
Created attachment 257271
[PATCH v2] mail/libopensmtpd: new port

Thanks for this work! I was also looking for these sets of ports and would like to help push this forward.

I've updated your patch based on the porter's handbook and portlint guidelines. Please let me know if everything looks ok, I'll also check/update the patch from the other bug.
